# Oriana Solutions

Oriana Solutions is a custom software development agency based in Montreal, Quebec, Canada. We design and build web applications, iOS/Android mobile apps, custom SaaS software, and websites for entrepreneurs, SMEs, and startups across Quebec and Canada.

## About

- **Location**: Montreal, Quebec, Canada
- **Specialty**: Custom software development, web apps, mobile apps, SaaS, AI integration
- **Target market**: Quebec SMEs, startups, entrepreneurs, marketing agencies
- **Languages**: French, English
- **Email**: info@orianasolutions.com
- **Phone**: 438 365-7789
- **Award**: 1st place winners at Défi OSEntreprendre — 2025 national finals (largest entrepreneurship competition in Quebec)

## Services

- **Web Application & SaaS**: Web platforms, client portals, internal tools, multi-user SaaS. Stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, .NET Core, Azure. [/application-web]
- **Mobile Application iOS & Android**: Native and cross-platform development (React Native, Flutter). App Store and Google Play submission included. [/developpement-application-mobile]
- **Custom Website**: Showcase sites, landing pages, institutional sites. Modern design, fast, SEO-optimized. [/site-web-sur-mesure]
- **Custom Software**: ERP, CRM, accounting software, booking software, client portal, real estate agent software. [/services]
- **AI Integration & Agents**: Process automation, AI agents, LLM integration into existing applications. [/integration-ia-agents]
- **Startup & MVP SaaS**: Rapid MVP development to validate ideas and raise funding. [/startup-mvp-saas]

## Technologies

- **Front-end**: Next.js, React, TypeScript
- **Back-end**: .NET Core (C#), Node.js
- **Mobile**: React Native, Flutter (iOS & Android)
- **Database**: PostgreSQL, Supabase, Firebase
- **Hosting**: Microsoft Azure, Vercel
- **Payments**: Stripe
- **Auth**: Firebase Auth, JWT, OAuth

## Areas Served

Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, Quebec City, Trois-Rivières — and across Canada remotely.

- Software development Montreal: [/developpement-logiciel-montreal]
- Software development Laval: [/developpement-logiciel-laval]
- Software development Longueuil: [/developpement-logiciel-longueuil]
- Software development Quebec City: [/developpement-logiciel-quebec]
- Software development Trois-Rivières: [/developpement-logiciel-trois-rivieres]

## Typical Clients

- Restaurants and bars
- Real estate brokers
- Local SMEs
- SaaS startups and founders
- Marketing agencies
- Independent coaches and professionals

## Pricing (indicative)

- Simple showcase website: from $2,500
- Standard web application: $8,000–$30,000
- Mobile application: $15,000–$60,000
- Complex custom software: $30,000+
- Monthly fees (hosting, support): $30–$2,500/month depending on project

Free price calculator: [/calculateur-prix]

---

# Oriana Solutions (Français)

Oriana Solutions est une agence de développement logiciel basée à Montréal, Québec, Canada. On conçoit et développe des applications web, des applications mobiles iOS/Android, des logiciels SaaS sur mesure et des sites web pour des entrepreneurs, des PME et des startups au Québec.

## Services

- **Application web & SaaS** : Plateformes web, portails clients, outils internes, SaaS multi-utilisateurs. [/application-web]
- **Application mobile iOS & Android** : Développement React Native et Flutter. Publication App Store et Google Play incluse. [/developpement-application-mobile]
- **Site web sur mesure** : Sites vitrines, landing pages, design moderne, rapide, optimisé SEO. [/site-web-sur-mesure]
- **Logiciel sur mesure** : ERP, CRM, logiciel comptable, logiciel de réservation, portail client, logiciel agent immobilier. [/services]
- **Intégration IA & agents** : Automatisation des procédés, agents IA, intégration LLM. [/integration-ia-agents]
- **Startup & MVP SaaS** : Développement rapide de MVP pour valider des idées. [/startup-mvp-saas]

## Zones desservies

Montréal, Laval, Longueuil, Québec, Trois-Rivières — et partout au Canada en remote.

## Tarifs indicatifs

- Site vitrine simple : à partir de 2 500 $
- Application web standard : 8 000 $ à 30 000 $
- Application mobile : 15 000 $ à 60 000 $
- Logiciel sur mesure complexe : 30 000 $ et plus

Outil de calcul de prix gratuit : [/calculateur-prix]
